class Node:
    def __init__(self):
        self.children = {}  # Maps first character of an edge to (child_node, edge_start_index, edge_end_index)
        self.suffix_index = None # Stores the starting index of the suffix if this is a leaf node.

class SuffixTree:
    def __init__(self, text):
        self.text = text
        self.root = Node()
        self.build_tree()

    def get_edge_string(self, start, end):
        return self.text[start:end]

    def _add_suffix_explicit(self, suffix_idx):
        current_node = self.root
        remainder_start = suffix_idx 
        
        while remainder_start < len(self.text):
            char_to_match = self.text[remainder_start]
            
            if char_to_match in current_node.children:
                next_node, edge_start, edge_end = current_node.children[char_to_match]
                
                edge_length = edge_end - edge_start
                
                match_len = 0
                while match_len < edge_length and \
                      remainder_start + match_len < len(self.text) and \
                      self.text[edge_start + match_len] == self.text[remainder_start + match_len]:
                    match_len += 1
                
                if match_len == edge_length:
                    current_node = next_node
                    remainder_start += match_len
                else:
                    new_internal_node = Node()
                    
                    current_node.children[char_to_match] = (new_internal_node, edge_start, edge_start + match_len)
                    
                    next_node_new_edge_start = edge_start + match_len
                    new_internal_node.children[self.text[next_node_new_edge_start]] = (next_node, next_node_new_edge_start, edge_end)
                    
                    new_leaf_node = Node()
                    new_leaf_node.suffix_index = suffix_idx
                    new_internal_node.children[self.text[remainder_start + match_len]] = \
                        (new_leaf_node, remainder_start + match_len, len(self.text))
                    
                    return
            else:
                new_leaf_node = Node()
                new_leaf_node.suffix_index = suffix_idx
                current_node.children[char_to_match] = \
                    (new_leaf_node, remainder_start, len(self.text))
                
                return
        
        # If the suffix was fully consumed and ended exactly at an existing node (e.g., "$")
        if current_node.suffix_index is None:
            current_node.suffix_index = suffix_idx

    def build_tree(self):
        if not self.text.endswith('$'):
            self.text += '$'
        
        for i in range(len(self.text)):
            self._add_suffix_explicit(i)

    def _print_tree_recursive(self, node, indent, edge_label_str, is_last_child_on_level):
        prefix = "└─ " if is_last_child_on_level else "├─ "
        
        node_description = edge_label_str
        if node.suffix_index is not None:
            node_description += f" (Leaf: {node.suffix_index})"
        
        if node != self.root:
            print(f"{indent}{prefix}{node_description}")

        children_keys = sorted(node.children.keys())
        for i, char_key in enumerate(children_keys):
            child_node, start, end = node.children[char_key]
            
            new_indent = indent + ("    " if node == self.root else ("|   " if not is_last_child_on_level else "    "))
            
            child_edge_str = self.get_edge_string(start, end)
            
            self._print_tree_recursive(child_node, new_indent, child_edge_str, (i == len(children_keys) - 1))

    def print_tree(self):
        print(f"Suffix Tree for: '{self.text}'")
        print("Root")
        
        children_keys = sorted(self.root.children.keys())
        for i, char_key in enumerate(children_keys):
            child_node, start, end = self.root.children[char_key]
            
            edge_str = self.get_edge_string(start, end)
            self._print_tree_recursive(child_node, "   ", edge_str, (i == len(children_keys) - 1))

if __name__ == '__main__':
    st = SuffixTree("banana")
    st.print_tree()

    print("\n" + "="*30 + "\n")

    st2 = SuffixTree("ATAGA")
    st2.print_tree()

    print("\n" + "="*30 + "\n")

    st3 = SuffixTree("mississippi")
    st3.print_tree()

    print("\n" + "="*30 + "\n")

    st4 = SuffixTree("abcab")
    st4.print_tree()
